productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Top
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this black top from united colors of benetton. The pretty feminine frills lend an exciting and diverse casual style while the blended fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and comfortable-yet-stylish footwear.Product DetailsBlack sleeveless top, has a round neck and a polyester cape over the shoulders which forms flutter sleevesMaterial and CareShell made of 100% polyester and lining made of viscoseMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
